TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mangcel, title = Mangcel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mangcel} }

S.FORM: Mangcel ŚĪĪÁĺĆ "Muntiacus reevesi" hananay a mapangangan, o " reeves's muntjac" hananay no padaka, o wawa no mangcel, huang -chin hananay no Aping,o mamangay a malonem,o wawa no malonem, o koma^enay to rengos a malonem, o kao'ripan nira ko Taiwan ato katimoly a kowan no kitakit no Aping. O malonem no Taiwani i mamangay ko tiring, 47~70 kongfen, o areteng nira i 10 a tingting, o wa'ay nira i mamangay. O okang a mangcel i ciwa'a'ay, nikaorira caay ka ta^elif ko 10 a kongfon, caay ka cica'ang, tangasa i 12 a folad misatapang a lomahad ko wa'a, tangasa i saka 6 a folad i, matefad koya wa'a; o tawinaan a away ko wa'a, o korul nira i kaliyaliyawan a to^eman, o falohang nira i, misakohecal a tomeri', o wa'ay nira i, micamol ko kohetingay. O tilid no mata nira i, mato sepatay a nengnengen i laay, saka ilako pangangan to sepatay ko mata malonem. Oniniya aadopen i, o rengos ko mikaenan nira, itini iTaiwan o calowayay a 'a'adopen no misapangcahay a tamdaw. Saka 9 alomi'ad no saka ccay no folad i 2019 a mihcaan, malo malalangay a 'a'adopen ko niniya malonem. O kakawa no tiring Ccay paka tolo a fakeciw ko kakaya' no tiring, o okang ci wa'a'ay, o tawinaan sa'ikawang ko 'okak to miming, itini no tokosan a okang malonem i, caay ka sasiloma pakaynien nira to pina'om to pidipot ato latingtingay kakawa nira ami liyas to 'ada. O okang a mangcel ilako kohetingay tilid ami lilis tangasa itapang no wa'a nira, nikaorira o tawinaan i, ila ko sapenopeno sanay a tilid, ato kohcalay itiyad nira ato kohcalay i salanoan no wikol, o nini haw i, o ccay no ilaay i tiring nira, o ngiha mato ngiha no mamangay ho a mangcel. O kasasiloma ato kahengangay a mangcel O 'alomanay a tamdaw moraraw ko pipalita nangra to tokosay mangcel ato kahengangay a malonem, saka moraraw ko loma a tamdaw to nika sasiloma no niniya 'a'adopen, itini pakakilac no citongay masongila' nangra ko kasasiloma no niniya tosa 'a'adopen. Ano nengengen ko aotal malo marecaday, o mangcel miming ko tatirengan, o fanges ilako kaliyawan ato linmadacay; o kahengangay a malonem tata'ang to miming ko tiring, kahengahengan a limadac. i 2006 a mihcaan i Hongkong ila ko pipalita ami kerap, mahapinang nangra kono ilotokay a mangcel sahto sa o kahengangay amalonem, nikaorira pitena' ami'adop, oyana no tokosay a mangcel, caay koya kahengangay a malonem. Oni ka laklak O mangcel i satimolan a kowan ato sasifo'an no kitakit no Aping, oloma ilako nika laklak i Fang-cong ato ito hananay a pala no Dipong, ato isatimolan no Tepi a pala no Englan a kitakit; ilako kala^enoay riyar ato kanafekangay no riyar to 3,000 fakciw konika laklak, itini i tatapangan no nanom ato ci kilangay a pala konika laklak. Tosa ko kasasiloma Ono Tasiwan ito kosay a mangcel ( M.reevesi Micrurus), ono padaka a pangangan (Formosa Reeve's muntjac),itini i kitakit no Taiwan, nanitini sala^eno no riyar tangsa i 3000 fakciw amalalak i laloma' no cikilangay ato i tatapanga no nanom. O Yacong hananay a 'adopen o dengan ato nononanoman a malonem ato cipenoay a malonem odeng o Taiwan ko ilaay. O pinangan O 'adihayay no tokos a mangcel I micidekay amalo', caay ka takekokeko saan koni kamalo', ccay a o kang a mangcel latek ila ko tolo ato sepat ko tawinaan. O kalenak Ono tokosan a tawinaan a mangcel lima a folad ma'ikesay to, 14 a lomi'ad ci fita'or to, ccay a nika cipoyapoy 7 tangsa i saka 8 a folad, maharek a mahofoc 3~4 a lomi'ad misatapang to a cipoyapoy, caay ka cala konika pacoco to wawa, saka malalid aci wawa to ccay a mihcaan, saka o tawinaan aci tiyad lapolopolong sanay a sitiyad, saka o wawaho mihofocan lalecalecad sayay hofocen. O okang a mangcel tangsa i saka 9 a folad a maliteng to, o pifalican to wa'a folad i, o pipengpengan nira to soloy, caay a lecad to malonem ko pinangan. O pipalita Muntiacus reevesi. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2008. (5 April 2009). Noycenpo Incawsu no Taiwan. Masasiloma'ay koying no Taiwan a no tokos mangcel. Noycenpo Ingcawsu- ato pisiwkay no kitakit a koen. Noycenpo Ingcawsu(2023-04=11),( rayray no rikec 2023-04-11) O mikowanay to notokos no iingkay no Singcenyan. Ato pakayni pisalof to rekec sapi dipotaw to kahilahila no 'a'adopen(2019-01-09 2019-02-13) ato olaay to a rikec 2019-02-13)
S.PHON: maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ** "mo~u~untia ¶o~u~us r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi" ńßananaj a mapaŇčaŇčan, o~u " r…ô…ôb~v…ôs °s mo~u~untja ¶" ńßananaj no~u pa…¨~…ģaka, o~u wawa no~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ, ńßo~u~uaŇč - ¶ńßin ńßananaj no~u apiŇč,o~u mamaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm,o~u wawa no~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm, o~u ko~uma Ē…ônaj to~u r…ôŇčo~us a ma…ĺo~un…ôm, o~u kao~u °ripan nira ko~u taiwan ato~u katimo~u…ĺj a ko~uwan no~u kitakit no~u apiŇč. o~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm no~u taiwani i mamaŇčaj ko~u tiriŇč, **~** ko~uŇčf…ôn, o~u ar…ôt…ôŇč nira i ** a tiŇčtiŇč, o~u wa °aj nira i mamaŇčaj. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i ¶iwa °a °aj, nikao~urira ¶aaj ka ta Ē…ô…ĺif ko~u ** a ko~uŇčfo~un, ¶aaj ka ¶i ¶a °aŇč, taŇčasa i ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ misatapaŇč a …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u wa °a, taŇčasa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i, mat…ôfa…¨~…ģ ko~uja wa °a; o~u tawinaan a awaj ko~u wa °a, o~u ko~uro~u~u…ĺ nira i ka…ĺija…ĺijawan a to~u Ē…ôman, o~u fa…ĺo~uńßaŇč nira i, misako~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺ a to~um…ôri °, o~u wa °aj nira i, mi ¶amo~u…ĺ ko~u ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj. o~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mata nira i, mato~u s…ôpataj a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn i …ĺaaj, saka i…ĺako~u paŇčaŇčan to~u s…ôpataj ko~u mata ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~uninija aa…¨~…ģo~up…ôn i, o~u r…ôŇčo~us ko~u mika…ônan nira, itini itaiwan o~u ¶a…ĺo~uwajaj a °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn no~u misapaŇč ¶ańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. saka * a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u saka ¶ ¶aj no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß ¶aan, ma…ĺo~u ma…ĺa…ĺaŇčaj a °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u ninija ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~u kakawa no~u tiriŇč ¶ ¶aj paka to~u…ĺo~u a fak…ô ¶iw ko~u kakaja ° no~u tiriŇč, o~u o~ukaŇč ¶i wa °a °aj, o~u tawinaan sa °ikawaŇč ko~u °o~ukak to~u mimiŇč, itini no~u to~uko~usan a o~ukaŇč ma…ĺo~un…ôm i, ¶aaj ka sasi…ĺo~uma pakajni…ôn nira to~u pina °o~um to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u …ĺatiŇčtiŇčaj kakawa nira ami …ĺijas to~u °a…¨~…ģa. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i…ĺako~u ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …ĺi…ĺis taŇčasa itapaŇč no~u wa °a nira, nikao~urira o~u tawinaan i, i…ĺa ko~u sap…ôno~up…ôno~u sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ato~u ko~uńß ¶a…ĺaj itija…¨~…ģ nira ato~u ko~uńß ¶a…ĺaj i sa…ĺano~uan no~u wiko~u…ĺ, o~u nini ńßaw i, o~u ¶ ¶aj no~u i…ĺaaj i tiriŇč nira, o~u Ňčińßa mato~u Ňčińßa no~u mamaŇčaj ńßo~u a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ. o~u kasasi…ĺo~uma ato~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ o~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw mo~uraraw ko~u pipa…ĺita naŇčra to~u to~uko~usaj maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ato~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm, saka mo~uraraw ko~u …ĺo~uma a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u nika sasi…ĺo~uma no~u ninija °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn, itini pakaki…ĺa ¶ no~u ¶ito~uŇčaj maso~uŇči…ĺa ° naŇčra ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma no~u ninija to~usa °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn. ano~u n…ôŇč…ôŇč…ôn ko~u ao~uta…ĺ ma…ĺo~u mar…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj, o~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ mimiŇč ko~u tatir…ôŇčan, o~u faŇč…ôs i…ĺako~u ka…ĺijawan ato~u …ĺinma…¨~…ģa ¶aj; o~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm tata °aŇč to~u mimiŇč ko~u tiriŇč, kańß…ôŇčańß…ôŇčan a …ĺima…¨~…ģa ¶. i **** a mińß ¶aan i ńßo~uŇčko~uŇč i…ĺa ko~u pipa…ĺita ami k…ôrap, mańßapinaŇč naŇčra ko~uno~u i…ĺo~uto~ukaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ sańßto~u sa o~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj ama…ĺo~un…ôm, nikao~urira pit…ôna ° ami °a…¨~…ģo~up, o~ujana no~u to~uko~usaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ, ¶aaj ko~uja kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~uni ka …ĺak…ĺak o~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i satimo~u…ĺan a ko~uwan ato~u sasifo~u °an no~u kitakit no~u apiŇč, o~u…ĺo~uma i…ĺako~u nika …ĺak…ĺak i faŇč- ¶o~uŇč ato~u ito~u ńßananaj a pa…ĺa no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, ato~u isatimo~u…ĺan no~u t…ôpi a pa…ĺa no~u …ôŇč…ĺan a kitakit; i…ĺako~u ka…ĺa Ē…ôno~uaj rijar ato~u kanaf…ôkaŇčaj no~u rijar to~u *,*** fak ¶iw ko~unika …ĺak…ĺak, itini i tatapaŇčan no~u nano~um ato~u ¶i ki…ĺaŇčaj a pa…ĺa ko~unika …ĺak…ĺak. to~usa ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma o~uno~u tasiwan ito~u ko~usaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ( m.r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi mi ¶ro~u~uro~u~us), o~uno~u pa…¨~…ģaka a paŇčaŇčan (fo~urmo~usa r…ô…ôb~v…ô °s mo~u~untja ¶),itini i kitakit no~u taiwan, nanitini sa…ĺa Ē…ôno~u no~u rijar taŇčsa i **** fak ¶iw ama…ĺa…ĺak i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u ¶iki…ĺaŇčaj ato~u i tatapaŇča no~u nano~um. o~u ja ¶o~uŇč ńßananaj a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ato~u no~uno~unano~uman a ma…ĺo~un…ôm ato~u ¶ip…ôno~uaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm o~u…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u taiwan ko~u i…ĺaaj. o~u pinaŇčan o~u °a…¨~…ģińßajaj no~u to~uko~us a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i mi ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj ama…ĺo~u °, ¶aaj ka tak…ôko~uk…ôko~u saan ko~uni kama…ĺo~u °, ¶ ¶aj a o~u kaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ …ĺat…ôk i…ĺa ko~u to~u…ĺo~u ato~u s…ôpat ko~u tawinaan. o~u ka…ĺ…ônak o~uno~u to~uko~usan a tawinaan a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ …ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ma °ik…ôsaj to~u, ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶i fita °o~ur to~u, ¶ ¶aj a nika ¶ipo~ujapo~uj * taŇčsa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mańßar…ôk a mańßo~ufo~u ¶ *~* a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ misatapaŇč to~u a ¶ipo~ujapo~uj, ¶aaj ka ¶a…ĺa ko~unika pa ¶o~u ¶o~u to~u wawa, saka ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ a ¶i wawa to~u ¶ ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, saka o~u tawinaan a ¶i tija…¨~…ģ …ĺapo~u…ĺo~upo~u…ĺo~uŇč sanaj a sitija…¨~…ģ, saka o~u wawańßo~u mińßo~ufo~u ¶an …ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ sajaj ńßo~ufo~u ¶…ôn. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ taŇčsa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺit…ôŇč to~u, o~u pifa…ĺi ¶an to~u wa °a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i, o~u pip…ôŇčp…ôŇčan nira to~u so~u…ĺo~uj, ¶aaj a …ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm ko~u pinaŇčan. o~u pipa…ĺita mo~u~untia ¶o~u~us r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi. tńß…ô io~u~u ¶n r…ô…¨~…ģ …ĺist o~uf tńßr…ôat…ôn…ô…¨~…ģ sp…ô ¶i…ôs ****. (* apri…ĺ ****). no~uj ¶…ônpo~u in ¶awso~u~u no~u taiwan. masasi…ĺo~uma °aj ko~ujiŇč no~u taiwan a no~u to~uko~us maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ. no~uj ¶…ônpo~u iŇč ¶awso~u~u- ato~u pisiwkaj no~u kitakit a ko~u…ôn. no~uj ¶…ônpo~u iŇč ¶awso~u~u(****-**=**),( rajraj no~u rik…ô ¶ ****-**-**) o~u miko~uwanaj to~u no~uto~uko~us no~u iiŇčkaj no~u siŇč ¶…ônjan. ato~u pakajni pisa…ĺo~uf to~u r…ôk…ô ¶ sapi …¨~…ģipo~utaw to~u kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa no~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn(****-**-** ****-**-**) ato~u o~u…ĺaaj to~u a rik…ô ¶ ****-**-**)
S.FORM: Mangcel ŚĪĪÁĺĆ "Muntiacus reevesi" hananay a mapangangan, o " reeves's muntjac" hananay no padaka, o wawa no mangcel, huang -chin hananay no Aping,o mamangay a malonem,o wawa no malonem, o koma^enay to rengos a malonem, o kao'ripan nira ko Taiwan ato katimoly a kowan no kitakit no Aping. O malonem no Taiwani i mamangay ko tiring, 47~70 kongfen, o areteng nira i 10 a tingting, o wa'ay nira i mamangay. O okang a mangcel i ciwa'a'ay, nikaorira caay ka ta^elif ko 10 a kongfon, caay ka cica'ang, tangasa i 12 a folad misatapang a lomahad ko wa'a, tangasa i saka 6 a folad i, matefad koya wa'a; o tawinaan a away ko wa'a, o korul nira i kaliyaliyawan a to^eman, o falohang nira i, misakohecal a tomeri', o wa'ay nira i, micamol ko kohetingay. O tilid no mata nira i, mato sepatay a nengnengen i laay, saka ilako pangangan to sepatay ko mata malonem. Oniniya aadopen i, o rengos ko mikaenan nira, itini iTaiwan o calowayay a 'a'adopen no misapangcahay a tamdaw. Saka 9 alomi'ad no saka ccay no folad i 2019 a mihcaan, malo malalangay a 'a'adopen ko niniya malonem. O kakawa no tiring Ccay paka tolo a fakeciw ko kakaya' no tiring, o okang ci wa'a'ay, o tawinaan sa'ikawang ko 'okak to miming, itini no tokosan a okang malonem i, caay ka sasiloma pakaynien nira to pina'om to pidipot ato latingtingay kakawa nira ami liyas to 'ada. O okang a mangcel ilako kohetingay tilid ami lilis tangasa itapang no wa'a nira, nikaorira o tawinaan i, ila ko sapenopeno sanay a tilid, ato kohcalay itiyad nira ato kohcalay i salanoan no wikol, o nini haw i, o ccay no ilaay i tiring nira, o ngiha mato ngiha no mamangay ho a mangcel. O kasasiloma ato kahengangay a mangcel O 'alomanay a tamdaw moraraw ko pipalita nangra to tokosay mangcel ato kahengangay a malonem, saka moraraw ko loma a tamdaw to nika sasiloma no niniya 'a'adopen, itini pakakilac no citongay masongila' nangra ko kasasiloma no niniya tosa 'a'adopen. Ano nengengen ko aotal malo marecaday, o mangcel miming ko tatirengan, o fanges ilako kaliyawan ato linmadacay; o kahengangay a malonem tata'ang to miming ko tiring, kahengahengan a limadac. i 2006 a mihcaan i Hongkong ila ko pipalita ami kerap, mahapinang nangra kono ilotokay a mangcel sahto sa o kahengangay amalonem, nikaorira pitena' ami'adop, oyana no tokosay a mangcel, caay koya kahengangay a malonem. Oni ka laklak O mangcel i satimolan a kowan ato sasifo'an no kitakit no Aping, oloma ilako nika laklak i Fang-cong ato ito hananay a pala no Dipong, ato isatimolan no Tepi a pala no Englan a kitakit; ilako kala^enoay riyar ato kanafekangay no riyar to 3,000 fakciw konika laklak, itini i tatapangan no nanom ato ci kilangay a pala konika laklak. Tosa ko kasasiloma Ono Tasiwan ito kosay a mangcel ( M.reevesi Micrurus), ono padaka a pangangan (Formosa Reeve's muntjac),itini i kitakit no Taiwan, nanitini sala^eno no riyar tangsa i 3000 fakciw amalalak i laloma' no cikilangay ato i tatapanga no nanom. O Yacong hananay a 'adopen o dengan ato nononanoman a malonem ato cipenoay a malonem odeng o Taiwan ko ilaay. O pinangan O 'adihayay no tokos a mangcel I micidekay amalo', caay ka takekokeko saan koni kamalo', ccay a o kang a mangcel latek ila ko tolo ato sepat ko tawinaan. O kalenak Ono tokosan a tawinaan a mangcel lima a folad ma'ikesay to, 14 a lomi'ad ci fita'or to, ccay a nika cipoyapoy 7 tangsa i saka 8 a folad, maharek a mahofoc 3~4 a lomi'ad misatapang to a cipoyapoy, caay ka cala konika pacoco to wawa, saka malalid aci wawa to ccay a mihcaan, saka o tawinaan aci tiyad lapolopolong sanay a sitiyad, saka o wawaho mihofocan lalecalecad sayay hofocen. O okang a mangcel tangsa i saka 9 a folad a maliteng to, o pifalican to wa'a folad i, o pipengpengan nira to soloy, caay a lecad to malonem ko pinangan. O pipalita Muntiacus reevesi. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2008. (5 April 2009). Noycenpo Incawsu no Taiwan. Masasiloma'ay koying no Taiwan a no tokos mangcel. Noycenpo Ingcawsu- ato pisiwkay no kitakit a koen. Noycenpo Ingcawsu(2023-04=11),( rayray no rikec 2023-04-11) O mikowanay to notokos no iingkay no Singcenyan. Ato pakayni pisalof to rekec sapi dipotaw to kahilahila no 'a'adopen(2019-01-09 2019-02-13) ato olaay to a rikec 2019-02-13)
S.PHON: maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ** "mo~u~untia ¶o~u~us r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi" ńßananaj a mapaŇčaŇčan, o~u " r…ô…ôb~v…ôs °s mo~u~untja ¶" ńßananaj no~u pa…¨~…ģaka, o~u wawa no~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ, ńßo~u~uaŇč - ¶ńßin ńßananaj no~u apiŇč,o~u mamaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm,o~u wawa no~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm, o~u ko~uma Ē…ônaj to~u r…ôŇčo~us a ma…ĺo~un…ôm, o~u kao~u °ripan nira ko~u taiwan ato~u katimo~u…ĺj a ko~uwan no~u kitakit no~u apiŇč. o~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm no~u taiwani i mamaŇčaj ko~u tiriŇč, **~** ko~uŇčf…ôn, o~u ar…ôt…ôŇč nira i ** a tiŇčtiŇč, o~u wa °aj nira i mamaŇčaj. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i ¶iwa °a °aj, nikao~urira ¶aaj ka ta Ē…ô…ĺif ko~u ** a ko~uŇčfo~un, ¶aaj ka ¶i ¶a °aŇč, taŇčasa i ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ misatapaŇč a …ĺo~umańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u wa °a, taŇčasa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i, mat…ôfa…¨~…ģ ko~uja wa °a; o~u tawinaan a awaj ko~u wa °a, o~u ko~uro~u~u…ĺ nira i ka…ĺija…ĺijawan a to~u Ē…ôman, o~u fa…ĺo~uńßaŇč nira i, misako~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺ a to~um…ôri °, o~u wa °aj nira i, mi ¶amo~u…ĺ ko~u ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj. o~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mata nira i, mato~u s…ôpataj a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn i …ĺaaj, saka i…ĺako~u paŇčaŇčan to~u s…ôpataj ko~u mata ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~uninija aa…¨~…ģo~up…ôn i, o~u r…ôŇčo~us ko~u mika…ônan nira, itini itaiwan o~u ¶a…ĺo~uwajaj a °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn no~u misapaŇč ¶ańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. saka * a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u saka ¶ ¶aj no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß ¶aan, ma…ĺo~u ma…ĺa…ĺaŇčaj a °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u ninija ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~u kakawa no~u tiriŇč ¶ ¶aj paka to~u…ĺo~u a fak…ô ¶iw ko~u kakaja ° no~u tiriŇč, o~u o~ukaŇč ¶i wa °a °aj, o~u tawinaan sa °ikawaŇč ko~u °o~ukak to~u mimiŇč, itini no~u to~uko~usan a o~ukaŇč ma…ĺo~un…ôm i, ¶aaj ka sasi…ĺo~uma pakajni…ôn nira to~u pina °o~um to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u …ĺatiŇčtiŇčaj kakawa nira ami …ĺijas to~u °a…¨~…ģa. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i…ĺako~u ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …ĺi…ĺis taŇčasa itapaŇč no~u wa °a nira, nikao~urira o~u tawinaan i, i…ĺa ko~u sap…ôno~up…ôno~u sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ato~u ko~uńß ¶a…ĺaj itija…¨~…ģ nira ato~u ko~uńß ¶a…ĺaj i sa…ĺano~uan no~u wiko~u…ĺ, o~u nini ńßaw i, o~u ¶ ¶aj no~u i…ĺaaj i tiriŇč nira, o~u Ňčińßa mato~u Ňčińßa no~u mamaŇčaj ńßo~u a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ. o~u kasasi…ĺo~uma ato~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ o~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw mo~uraraw ko~u pipa…ĺita naŇčra to~u to~uko~usaj maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ato~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm, saka mo~uraraw ko~u …ĺo~uma a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u nika sasi…ĺo~uma no~u ninija °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn, itini pakaki…ĺa ¶ no~u ¶ito~uŇčaj maso~uŇči…ĺa ° naŇčra ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma no~u ninija to~usa °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn. ano~u n…ôŇč…ôŇč…ôn ko~u ao~uta…ĺ ma…ĺo~u mar…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj, o~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ mimiŇč ko~u tatir…ôŇčan, o~u faŇč…ôs i…ĺako~u ka…ĺijawan ato~u …ĺinma…¨~…ģa ¶aj; o~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm tata °aŇč to~u mimiŇč ko~u tiriŇč, kańß…ôŇčańß…ôŇčan a …ĺima…¨~…ģa ¶. i **** a mińß ¶aan i ńßo~uŇčko~uŇč i…ĺa ko~u pipa…ĺita ami k…ôrap, mańßapinaŇč naŇčra ko~uno~u i…ĺo~uto~ukaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ sańßto~u sa o~u kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj ama…ĺo~un…ôm, nikao~urira pit…ôna ° ami °a…¨~…ģo~up, o~ujana no~u to~uko~usaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ, ¶aaj ko~uja kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm. o~uni ka …ĺak…ĺak o~u maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i satimo~u…ĺan a ko~uwan ato~u sasifo~u °an no~u kitakit no~u apiŇč, o~u…ĺo~uma i…ĺako~u nika …ĺak…ĺak i faŇč- ¶o~uŇč ato~u ito~u ńßananaj a pa…ĺa no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, ato~u isatimo~u…ĺan no~u t…ôpi a pa…ĺa no~u …ôŇč…ĺan a kitakit; i…ĺako~u ka…ĺa Ē…ôno~uaj rijar ato~u kanaf…ôkaŇčaj no~u rijar to~u *,*** fak ¶iw ko~unika …ĺak…ĺak, itini i tatapaŇčan no~u nano~um ato~u ¶i ki…ĺaŇčaj a pa…ĺa ko~unika …ĺak…ĺak. to~usa ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma o~uno~u tasiwan ito~u ko~usaj a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ ( m.r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi mi ¶ro~u~uro~u~us), o~uno~u pa…¨~…ģaka a paŇčaŇčan (fo~urmo~usa r…ô…ôb~v…ô °s mo~u~untja ¶),itini i kitakit no~u taiwan, nanitini sa…ĺa Ē…ôno~u no~u rijar taŇčsa i **** fak ¶iw ama…ĺa…ĺak i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u ¶iki…ĺaŇčaj ato~u i tatapaŇča no~u nano~um. o~u ja ¶o~uŇč ńßananaj a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ato~u no~uno~unano~uman a ma…ĺo~un…ôm ato~u ¶ip…ôno~uaj a ma…ĺo~un…ôm o~u…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u taiwan ko~u i…ĺaaj. o~u pinaŇčan o~u °a…¨~…ģińßajaj no~u to~uko~us a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ i mi ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj ama…ĺo~u °, ¶aaj ka tak…ôko~uk…ôko~u saan ko~uni kama…ĺo~u °, ¶ ¶aj a o~u kaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ …ĺat…ôk i…ĺa ko~u to~u…ĺo~u ato~u s…ôpat ko~u tawinaan. o~u ka…ĺ…ônak o~uno~u to~uko~usan a tawinaan a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ …ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ma °ik…ôsaj to~u, ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶i fita °o~ur to~u, ¶ ¶aj a nika ¶ipo~ujapo~uj * taŇčsa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mańßar…ôk a mańßo~ufo~u ¶ *~* a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ misatapaŇč to~u a ¶ipo~ujapo~uj, ¶aaj ka ¶a…ĺa ko~unika pa ¶o~u ¶o~u to~u wawa, saka ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ a ¶i wawa to~u ¶ ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, saka o~u tawinaan a ¶i tija…¨~…ģ …ĺapo~u…ĺo~upo~u…ĺo~uŇč sanaj a sitija…¨~…ģ, saka o~u wawańßo~u mińßo~ufo~u ¶an …ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ sajaj ńßo~ufo~u ¶…ôn. o~u o~ukaŇč a maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ taŇčsa i saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ a ma…ĺit…ôŇč to~u, o~u pifa…ĺi ¶an to~u wa °a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ i, o~u pip…ôŇčp…ôŇčan nira to~u so~u…ĺo~uj, ¶aaj a …ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm ko~u pinaŇčan. o~u pipa…ĺita mo~u~untia ¶o~u~us r…ô…ôb~v…ôsi. tńß…ô io~u~u ¶n r…ô…¨~…ģ …ĺist o~uf tńßr…ôat…ôn…ô…¨~…ģ sp…ô ¶i…ôs ****. (* apri…ĺ ****). no~uj ¶…ônpo~u in ¶awso~u~u no~u taiwan. masasi…ĺo~uma °aj ko~ujiŇč no~u taiwan a no~u to~uko~us maŇč ¶…ô…ĺ. no~uj ¶…ônpo~u iŇč ¶awso~u~u- ato~u pisiwkaj no~u kitakit a ko~u…ôn. no~uj ¶…ônpo~u iŇč ¶awso~u~u(****-**=**),( rajraj no~u rik…ô ¶ ****-**-**) o~u miko~uwanaj to~u no~uto~uko~us no~u iiŇčkaj no~u siŇč ¶…ônjan. ato~u pakajni pisa…ĺo~uf to~u r…ôk…ô ¶ sapi …¨~…ģipo~utaw to~u kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa no~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn(****-**-** ****-**-**) ato~u o~u…ĺaaj to~u a rik…ô ¶ ****-**-**)
